channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Guiding Students to Develop Critical Thinking Skills in the Age of AI
item.description: In the evolving landscape of higher education, the rise of generative AI has transformed how students approach writing and research. A writing professor at Babson College describes the challenges and ...

item.title: Labour Introduces Programmes to Support Youth Employment Amid Rising Unemployment
item.description: Polly Toynbee reports from a London jobcentre, observing the struggles and aspirations of unemployed young people in the current economic climate. Many are highly educated and motivated, yet face inte...

item.title: Indian-origin Savani brothers convicted in US for multi-million dollar Medicaid and H-1B visa fraud schemes
item.description: Two Indian-origin brothers, Bhaskar Savani (60) and Arun Savani (58), have been convicted by a federal jury in Pennsylvania on 9 March 2026 for running a long-running racketeering conspiracy through t...

item.title: Understanding How Crude Oil is Refined into Petrol, Diesel, and Other Products
item.description: As tensions rise in the US–Israel conflict with Iran, global oil markets have felt the heat, especially due to disruptions at the Strait of Hormuz, a key route for nearly 20% of the world's oil and ga...

item.title: Former Presidents Mbeki and Zuma Seek Review of Judge Khampepe’s Decision in TRC Inquiry
item.description: The Gauteng High Court is currently hearing a case brought by former South African presidents Thabo Mbeki and Jacob Zuma. Both leaders are challenging the decision of retired judge Sisi Khampepe, who ...

item.description: In a highly anticipated rematch in UAAP Season 88 softball, the Adamson University softball team successfully avenged their first-round defeat against the University of the Philippines (UP). After a c...

item.title: Canadian Employers Adapt to Evolving Pay Transparency and AI Compliance Requirements
item.description: Canadian businesses are navigating a rapidly changing regulatory environment as both pay transparency and artificial intelligence (AI) disclosure laws take effect. According to the ADP survey 'Canada ...

item.title: Challenges of Bodaboda Safety and Traffic Compliance in Tanzania
item.description: In Dar es Salaam, the rapid growth of the bodaboda industry, despite being approved by the government as a public transport solution, has raised significant road safety concerns. Many riders frequentl...

item.title: Algeria Strengthens Ties with Sahel States to Rebuild Regional Influence
item.description: Algeria don start to rebuild im diplomatic and economic relationship with the Sahel countries, especially Niger and Burkina Faso, after a serious rift wey happen in 2025 when Algerian forces shoot dow...

item.title: Nhulunbuy Faces Uncertain Future as Woolworths Considers Store Closure
item.description: The Northern Territory town of Nhulunbuy is confronting a challenging future as major economic players, including Rio Tinto and possibly Woolworths, scale back their presence. The closure of the Rio T...

item.title: Akwa Ibom Police Rescue Seven Human Trafficking Victims, Arrest Four Suspects
item.description: For Akwa Ibom State, police don successfully rescue seven people wey dem dey carry for human trafficking along Ikot Ekpene–Aba Road. The state police spokesman, DSP Timfon John, talk say the rescue fo...

item.title: Understanding the Real Motives Behind the US-Israel-Iran Conflict
item.description: The article explains that the ongoing tension and war threats around Iran are often misrepresented as purely religious or sectarian conflicts. Labels like Shia-Sunni, Arab-Persian, or Christian-Muslim...

item.title: Andy Townsend Sees Opportunities for Bafana Bafana in Expanded World Cup
item.description: Former Chelsea player and Premier League pundit Andy Townsend has expressed cautious optimism for South Africa's national soccer team, Bafana Bafana, ahead of the FIFA World Cup in the USA and Mexico....

item.description: This Wall Street Journal live coverage page tracks real-time developments in major U.S. stock indexes on March 17, 2026. It provides ongoing updates on the Dow Jones Industrial Average, S&P 500, and N...

item.title: Manchester United Mocks Chelsea Over Pre-Match Huddle Controversy
item.description: On Saturday, the Premier League spotlight was not just on the football action but on Chelsea's unusual pre-match huddle. The Blues had to conduct their team talk with referee Paul Tierney in the middl...

item.title: Campaigners urge real-time water quality monitoring at Lake Windermere after serious infections
item.description: Campaigners have called for the introduction of real-time pollution warnings at Lake Windermere following two serious cases of illness linked to swimming in the lake. Last summer, a seven-year-old boy...

item.description: One Bayelsa-based lawyer, Barrister Abraham Marshall, wey dey contest for National Assistant Secretary in the Ijaw National Congress (INC), don yarn say the court order wey stop the March 7, 2026 elec...

item.title: Bulrush beds in urban wetlands are vital habitats for reed warblers and other waterbirds
item.description: In urban areas around Chennai, particularly in wetlands such as Pallikaranai and Perumbakkam, bulrush beds provide essential habitat for several bird species, including the Clamorous reed warbler, Pal...

item.title: Trump Jokes About Venezuela Becoming a U.S. State Following Baseball Victory
item.description: Former President Donald Trump sparked controversy on social media after suggesting that Venezuela could become the 51st U.S. state. The comment came after Venezuela defeated Italy 4–2 in the World Bas...

item.title: Tanzanian Digital Platform MedPack Strengthens Pharmacy Services Across the Country
item.description: In Tanzania, many people start their healthcare journey at local pharmacies and Accredited Drug Dispensing Outlets (ADDOs), but these places often struggle with sourcing medicines, fragmented supply c...
